name: Salmon Italianne
recipeIngredient: to spread about 1/3 inch thick over salmon
to make a thin layer over mayonnaise
3/4 cup Finely minced onion (or slightly less)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line baking pan with a sheet of tin foil.
2. Cut the salmon into about six pieces (each about 3" x 3").
3. Cover each piece with a thick layer of mayonnaise (about 1/3 inch thick).
4. Cover the mayonnaise with a very thin layer of ketchup.
5. Sprinkle minced onion over each serving.
6. Divide the bacon evenly over the fish.
7. Bake at 400°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
